theme_archetype.reasoning: A premium physical product + companion app positioned similarly to Apple hardware. Dark theme emphasizes the 'Lockin' (focus, lights out, deep work) concept while allowing product photography to shine.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-tight
rules.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-tight
rules.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-white/40 mb-4 block

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow the product imagery to breathe. Use negative space to emphasize luxury.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' / Bento grid for features to map the hardware+software ecosystem. Mode: 1 col mobile, 3 or 4 cols desktop.

components_instructions.buttons: Premium feel. Solid white bg with black text for primary (Apple style), or glowing emerald outline for secondary. Hover state: subtle scale (scale-105) and glow. Always include data-testid.
components_instructions.cards: Glassmorphism: bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/[0.08] rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl p-8. Hover: border-white/[0.15] shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.03)].
components_instructions.navigation: Sticky header (z-50). backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/70 border-b border-white/5. Desktop navigation visible (no hamburger on desktop).
components_instructions.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay from bottom to blend the hero image smoothly into the background: bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0B] via-[#0A0A0B]/40 to-transparent.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling is mandatory (use Lenis if possible, or CSS scroll-behavior: smooth).
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Fade in and slight translate-y-4 on scroll for text blocks.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Cards and buttons should have subtle but instant feedback (transition-all duration-300 ease-out).

hero_nfc_brick.description: Large hero background image showing the Lockin NFC brick and smartphone.

how_it_works_tap.description: Image demonstrating tapping the phone on the NFC block.

gamification_ui.description: Mobile app UI showing streaks, achievements, and gamification.

abstract_glass_bg.description: Abstract 3D floating glass background for the Settings or Pricing section.

partner_logo_1.description: Use purely as an abstract placeholder logo or filter it grayscale if rendering partner logos.

partner_logo_2.description: Favour Media logo to be used in 'featured in' or partner section.

sections_breakdown.name: Navigation
sections_breakdown.layout: Flexbox, space-between, sticky top. Logo on left, links center, CTA right.
sections_breakdown.content: Links: Features, How it Works, FAQ. CTA: 'Buy Now' button.

sections_breakdown.name: Hero
sections_breakdown.layout: Relative container. Full width. Content centered over the background image.
sections_breakdown.content: Headline: 'Focus, materialized.', Subheadline: 'Tap to disconnect. Lockin is the physical brick that instantly blocks distractions on your phone.', Primary CTA: 'Get Lockin'. Large hero_nfc_brick image behind with gradient overlay.

sections_breakdown.name: How It Works (3 Steps)
sections_breakdown.layout: 3-column grid (md:grid-cols-3) with gap-8. 'how_it_works_tap' image featured above or beside the steps.
sections_breakdown.content: Step 1: Open App. Step 2: Tap to Lockin. Step 3: NFC Tap Phone to Brick.

sections_breakdown.name: Features Bento
sections_breakdown.layout: Grid layout. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Mix of span-1 and span-2 cards.
sections_breakdown.content: Cards for: Bricking (app theme updates, stopwatch), Scheduled Bricking (modes, alarms), Gamification (streaks, badges - use gamification_ui image), Settings (strict mode, emergency unbrick). Use Lucide icons for visual interest.

sections_breakdown.name: Pricing/Store
sections_breakdown.layout: Centered pricing card against abstract_glass_bg image (with heavy overlay to maintain text readability).
sections_breakdown.content: Single product card. High-quality physical brick rendering (or use hero image again in small). Price, bullet points, mock 'Buy Now' button.

sections_breakdown.name: Testimonials
sections_breakdown.content: User reviews highlighting focus and productivity gains. Use the provided avatar images.

sections_breakdown.name: FAQ
sections_breakdown.content: Shadcn Accordion component. Minimalist style, border-b only, no backgrounds on items.

sections_breakdown.name: Footer
sections_breakdown.layout: Large padding (py-32). Newsletter signup, large typography logo.
sections_breakdown.content: Massive 'LOCKIN.' text at the bottom. Newsletter input using Shadcn input/button.

accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Every button, link, and interactive element MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='faq-accordion-item-1').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use white/60 for secondary text, never darker.
